interactions.label: Browse Shelf A
interactions.description: Row upon row of reference books. Somewhere in these pages might be the answer you need.

interactions.label: Browse Shelf B
interactions.description: Literature and philosophy. A different kind of wisdom waits between these covers.

interactions.label: Browse Shelf C
interactions.description: Science and mathematics. Formulas and theories that could boost your exam performance.

interactions.label: Browse Shelf D
interactions.description: History and social studies. Understanding the past might help navigate the present.

interactions.label: Read at Table
interactions.description: A large reading table. A perfect spot to spread out your materials and focus.
